page_title: Attack Junior High School (Junior High Anime)
text:
The is a school made for both humans and Titans.

People who attend the school are Eren, Mikasa, Armin, and other 104th year group. The school's human principal is Dhalis Zachary.

Structure
 
Attack Junior High consists of classrooms and clubs. Each is led by their own teachers, but all are subordinate to the human principal Dhalis Zachary and the main principal the Colossal Titan

Attack Junior High Scout Regiment

A club operates secretly in Titan Junior High. It was created by the 3rd year students, and hidden by the school itself. The club's advisor is Erwin Smith.

The symbol of the Attack Junior High Scout Regiment is a pair of wings, known as "the wings of freedom".

Student Council

The Student Council is a group of students elected by their peers to address issues of concern and organize student events and activities. The student council president is Marco Bodt.

The symbol of the Student Council is a unicorn.

Wall Cleanup Club

The Wall Cleanup Club is a club responsible to maintain the school's walls and cleanup vandalism caused by the Titans. Originally boasted over 100 members, Rico Brzenska, one of the original members, serves as the club's president.

The symbol of the Wall Cleanup Club is a pair of roses.

Layout

The school is mainly split up into two separate buildings: the first being a building for humans, and the next being a building for Titans. The only thing that is isolating the two buildings is a large wall that only the Titan principal can tower over. The objects in the Titan building are notably larger in scale than the objects in the human building, and it takes on a more disheveled appearance. In contrast, the human building resembles a normal middle school, excluding the fact that there are incredibly tall walls looming over the premises. 

Uniforms

All students in this school wear similar uniforms. The male students wear a black gakuran consisting of pants and sneakers while female students wear a sailor fuku that features a brown jacket and purple kogal skirt. 

In the summer months, all students wear a white plain polo shirt with the females wear bolo ties depending on their grade level.

During physical education classes, students in Attack Junior High wear jogging suits, shorts, t-shirts and a headband in the colors of their respective grades.
